rag_rules: Place implementation-level bindings (like assignments) within the implementation scope of the target component.
Ensure AGREE contracts referencing component ports are placed within the component type scope.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts are defined within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use the AADL model as the authoritative source for component structure (names, ports, connections).
Implementation-level contracts should focus on existing outputs or declared auxiliary variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Refer to visible inputs and outputs in guarantees to establish dependencies.
Avoid using subcomponent paths directly in component type annexes.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to use AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly as AGREE variables.
Avoid placing guarantee statements within implementation scopes.
